snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - stupid song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq


Lyrics

New York City’s never looked so blue
My friends are smoking blunts in the bathroom
They say that honest love
Is a cage that makes you feel free
And all the girls at this party are so cool
That’s never been a thing that I could do
But I can’t help but imagine
What you say when you speak with me

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Walking through the park with my head high
Past all the college girls and the drunk guys
And if there is a God
He’s the bond that’s between us two
Seven nights alone and a skipped meal
I’m sleeping in my dress and my high heels
And I’m too shy to say what I see
When I dream of you
When I dream of you

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Every night like the one before
Dream of you from like 1 to 4
Positively and truly sure
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With the hand on my heart I swore
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With a hand on my heart I swore

I’m going crazy
I’m going mad
I want you baby so bad

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

snippet.title: Shion | New Hero Gameplay Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
You don’t become the leader of the Hashimoto by playing it safe.

Introducing Shion - the newest hitscan Damage Hero joining the roster and the next major player in the Reign of Talon.

Armed with dual semi-auto pistols, an omnidirectional dash, and a motorcycle she can throw, Shion thrives in dangerous situations with nothing to lose and everything to gain.

Join her as she paints the town red when Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den launches on June 16.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, now including Nintendo Switch™ 2"!
_

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

Cupidon - Tony M (Clip Officiel)

[Couplet 1]
Ils me souhaitent du mal, ils souhaitent que je tombe
Y veulent m’enfermer et que j’finisse à l’ombre
C’est pas des lions frérot c’est des pions
J’veux pas des amis frérot j’veux des millions
J’ai plus mes menottes maintenant j’mets mes bijoux
J’suis seul sur la route et ma musique a joué
J’viens d’faire un profit j’veux juste rentrer chez nous
C’était censé être un lick ça finit sur les news
Elle m’envoie des bisous mais tu me dis qu’c’est la tienne
Partout c’est la merde tous les hoods c’est la même
On récolte c’que l’on sème on parle pas de c’que l’on sait
Attention à c’que tu dis tous les petits sont armés
Tout est carré j’arrive préparé
J’m’affirme haut et fort toujours prêt à y aller
Papier dans la mire hoodie AMIRI
Sélection de sticks le tout vient d’Amérique

[Refrain]
Et ça ring ring ring l’argent appelle
Mais tard le soir la mort aussi appelle
Deux appels on répondra auxquels ?
Deux appels on répondra aux...
Empiler du fric voilà la vraie notion
Toujours dans le trafic on a d’la vraie motion
Le cœur est frigide on est sans émotion
Packet d’sticks frérot j’protégerai ma position
762 c’est les munitions
J’t’envoie à la mort voilà la punition
Et si dans le futur on m’attrape dos au mur
Tony M dernière scène j’tire dans toutes directions

[Couplet 2]
Le switch c’est la Kalash on empile les cadavres
On empile le cheese la salade et les tomates
LV les camarades on a tous les contacts
À tous mes musulmans je vous passe le salam
À l’opposition j’suis back j’vous passe le salut
Les dix pires de la ville répètent que j’suis un salaud
À tous les matelots venez monter à bord
Les armes nous protègent on fait pas corps à corps
Dans la jail j’étais dans le max dans les pires corridors
Armé de mon épée c’est même pas une métaphore
Méga fort on y va les affaires sont virales
Y veulent qu’j’crash dans l’virage mais j’me dis tout ira
J’ai deux baddies sur moi y'a ces deux siamoises
Et dis-leur que j’viens pas si c’est pas deux à la fois
J’t’enverrai une bad bitch c’est un vrai guet-apens

snippet.title: Gatto | Teaser Trailer | In Theaters March 5, 2027
snippet.description:
Ciao Gatto
Watch the new teaser for Disney & Pixar's #Gatto, arriving in theaters March 5, 2027

Mark Ruffalo (“Poor Things,” “The Avengers,” “Spotlight, “Foxcatcher”) has joined the voice cast as the scrappy black cat Nero, and Laurence Fishburne (“The Matrix” trilogy, “Boyz n the Hood,” “What's Love Got to Do with It”) will voice the ruthless mob boss cat Rocco. The teaser trailer introduces Nero and Rocco as they question another cat in a funny interrogation scene.
In “Gatto,” after years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city of Venice, Italy, Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to Rocco, the local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first.
“Gatto” is directed by Enrico Casarosa and produced by Andrea Warren, the filmmaking team behind the Oscar®-nominated feature “Luca.” The new film releases exclusively in theaters March 5, 2027.

ABOUT PIXAR ANIMATION STUDIOS
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

Indebted to Rocco, the local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first.
“Gatto” is directed by Enrico Casarosa and produced by Andrea Warren, the filmmaking team behind the Oscar®-nominated feature “Luca.” The new film releases exclusively in theaters March 5, 2027.

ABOUT PIXAR ANIMATION STUDIOS
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

----------

PAROLES // RIEN NE SERA PLUS COMME AVANT

J’leur sors un banger maintenant qu’j’ai fini d’payer ma piscine
J’ai brisé ma destinée, j’ai défié les lois de la physique 
Panique pas 
Si tu me trouves écrasé sur le plancher d’la cuisine 
Ça voudra dire que j’aurai flanché sous le poids d’la critique 
Je maudit le jour où la musique est devenue d’la business 
Au final la famille reste la plus belle de mes richesses 
Fuller les Plaines d’Abraham, numéro 1 sur ma wishlist 
J’suis rentré dans l’industrie par la cave avec un pied d’biche 
J’prends d’la finesse, j’prends d’l’altitude et d’la vitesse 
J’en avais lourd sur le cœur, pardonnez mon impolitesse 
13e album, je reviens pour tout carboniser 
C’est l’art d’utiliser la violence sans la valoriser 
  
Fier 
Fier de moi 
Fier de mes frères 
J’ai juste besoin d’prendre un peu d’air 
J’aimerais bien boire un dernier verre 
Mais j’veux pas finir comme mon père 
Et si c’était à refaire 
J’referais tout de la même manière
 
Micro élevé
Encore sur le banc des penalty
Guess who’s back devine qui même si j’suis jamais parti 
Limoilou dans l’coeur et ça même depuis qu’j’ai quitté Bardy 
Pour que l’histoire reste ineffaçable fallait l’écrire au Sharpie 
Y’a que des bad luck
Donc faut penser à l’avance 
Sorti du matelas 
J’ai déposé mon money à la banque 
Veuillez pardonner mes manières extravagantes 
Je n’ai jamais changé mon accent juste pour plaire à la France 
On va jouer franc jeu 
J’aurai servi d’exemple pour les envieux 
Faire d’la musique c’est comme tomber en amour avec une danseuse 
Y’a d’la place pour tout le monde, des privilèges pour les plus chanceux 
Quand tu veux garder ton âme le prix du succès est dispendieux 
Passer mon message c’est comme shooter sans silencieux 
Dis-moi si je suis trop réaliste ou trop prétentieux 
Rapper c’est comme chanter la romance de tous les dangers 
Quand je voudrai mettre un terme à mes souffrances faudra m’débrancher 

Fier 
Fier de moi 
Fier de mes frères 
J’ai juste besoin d’prendre un peu d’air 
J’aimerais bien boire un dernier verre 
Mais j’veux pas finir comme mon père 
Et si c’était à refaire 
J’referais tout de la même manière

----------

Mais j’veux pas finir comme mon père 
Et si c’était à refaire 
J’referais tout de la même manière

snippet.title: THE SOCIAL RECKONING – Official Teaser Trailer (HD)
snippet.description:
Every revolution begins with a reckoning.
 
The Social Reckoning, a companion piece to The Social Network, is coming exclusively to theatres October 9.

THE SOCIAL RECKONING
Dramatic Thriller
October 9, 2026

A companion piece to the hit film The Social Network, Sorkin’s original screenplay is based on the events that gave rise to the Wall Street Journal’s shocking exposé The Facebook Files. The film is inspired by the true story of how Frances Haugen (Madison), a young Facebook engineer, enlists the help of Jeff Horwitz (White), a Wall Street Journal reporter, to go on a dangerous journey that ends up blowing the whistle on the social network’s most guarded secrets. 

Written and Directed by:

snippet.title: The Fast and the Furious | 25th Anniversary Re-Release Trailer
snippet.description:
We’re taking it back to the streets. The Fast and the Furious returns to theaters August 21. Tickets available now

About The Fast and The Furious:
They've got the adrenaline rush and the mean machines, but most of all, they've got the extreme need for speed. On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto (Vin Diesel), rules the road turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran (Rick Yune) are the boldest, the baddest and the best. But now, there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective (Paul Walker) with enough drive and determination to come out the winner. With intense full-throttle action, awesome high-speed stunts, and full-on pedal to the metal intensity, this fast and furious assault puts you in the driver's seat and dares you to exceed all limits.

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

Unrealistically distressed
I play it out in my head
Catastrophically obsessed
It makes me wanna rip my heart out of my chest cause

I just see death

But I deprive myself like it’s a ritual

Hyperfixation, no medication

snippet.title: Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Husband. Leader. Mutant. 🕶️

As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

He's the one in charge for a reason. Find out why as Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th!  💥
